# CWE-290 — Authentication Bypass by Spoofing (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-290-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Safe: identity comes only from validated session cookie set by auth middleware.
func WhoAmI(c *gin.Context) {
	sid, err := c.Cookie("session_id")
	if err != nil || sid == "" {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "anonymous"})
		return
	}
	user, ok := c.Get("session_user")
	if !ok {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "invalid session"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"user": user})
}
